lineage.Process: SpatialJoin D:\GEE\SPI、TWI、STI、aspect重做\YW\YW1.shp D:\GEE\中间\栅格转点2\rain.shp D:\GEE\SPI、TWI、STI、aspect重做\YW\YW2.shp JOIN_ONE_TO_ONE KEEP_COMMON "grid_code "grid_code" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,D:\GEE\SPI、TWI、STI、aspect重做\YW\YW1.shp,grid_code,-1,-1;grid_cod_1 "grid_cod_1" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,D:\GEE\中间\栅格转点2\rain.shp,grid_code,-1,-1" INTERSECT # #

SpatialJoin D:\GEE\SPI、TWI、STI、aspect重做\YW\YW2.shp D:\GEE\中间\栅格转点2\podu.shp D:\GEE\SPI、TWI、STI、aspect重做\YW\YW3.shp JOIN_ONE_TO_ONE KEEP_COMMON "grid_code "grid_code" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,D:\GEE\SPI、TWI、STI、aspect重做\YW\YW2.shp,grid_code,-1,-1;grid_cod_1 "grid_cod_1" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,D:\GEE\SPI、TWI、STI、aspect重做\YW\YW2.shp,grid_cod_1,-1,-1;grid_cod_2 "grid_cod_2" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,D:\GEE\中间\栅格转点2\podu.shp,grid_code,-1,-1" INTERSECT # #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
